## Release-Note Excerpt Template

Benchmarks were run on `<platform summary>` at `<repo_commit>` against spec commit `<spec_commit>` and corpus commit `<corpus_commit>`. Use the median values above for cited read/fold/write/pack/unpack numbers, and cite the streaming-memory rows separately because they measure RSS or runtime allocation behavior rather than CLI wall time.
